name: Eggplant Spread

ingredients.item: medium ripe tomato, peeled, seeded, and chopped
Prick eggplants in a few places and put on a square of aluminum foil in pan.
Bake about 40 minutes, or until soft.
Remove stems and peel eggplants, scraping any flesh from skin.
Remove excess seeds, discard skin, and chop eggplant.
Blend in olive oil and onion well with eggplant.
Season with lemon juice, salt, pepper, 3 pitted olives, sliced, and 2 tablespoons parsley.
Garnish with remaining 3 olives, sliced, and chopped parsley.
Serve with crusty bread or crackers as an appetizer or over lettuce as salad.
